modification_notice: Extracted complete Simplified Chinese introductory and purpose sentences from the checksum-pinned PDF with pypdf 5.9.0, applied Unicode NFC and conservative PDF-whitespace normalization, removed exact within-source duplicates, and added input-only candidate metadata; complex lists, headings, fragments, third-party links, and converter output were excluded, and no expected text was used.
known_biases: Translated U.S. public-health program descriptions are not representative of ordinary Taiwan product traffic.
The document describes historical COVID-19 programs and must not be treated as current medical guidance.
Only complete introductory and purpose sentences are retained because the PDF text layer merges complex columns and lists.
Domain and conversion-risk labels remain unset until input-only review.
A maximum of 10% of the final candidate pool may come from this source.
